description: Temporary allowlist for components that predate required co-located agent intent. Entries must only be removed, never added.

legacySummaries.component:ds-badge: Compact counter or notification dot for status and unread indicators.
legacySummaries.component:ds-banner: Intent-colored message bar. Supports floating toast mode with auto-dismiss and fade-out animation.
legacySummaries.component:ds-button-unfilled: Unfilled button with variant (label / icon / icon-label), control-density sizes, width hug/fill, active/border/dot, and surface-aware interaction states.
legacySummaries.component:ds-card: Shared card chrome — width + matching min-height tokens, header (title + actions slot), and a flex body that fills leftover space. Compose from settings and data-viz cards.
legacySummaries.component:ds-card-data-viz-donut: Donut data-viz card on shared ds-card chrome — fill chart region, content-sized legend, header filter action, and chart↔legend hover sync.
legacySummaries.component:ds-card-setting: Settings page section shell composed on ds-card with view/edit header actions. Edit state is controlled by the parent.
legacySummaries.component:ds-checkbox: Three-state checkbox (checked, unchecked, indeterminate) with keyboard support and custom icon slots.
legacySummaries.component:ds-chip: Removable metadata chip — same control-density recipe as Tag, colored by semantic state (default / active / error / caution). Not a toggle/select control.
legacySummaries.component:ds-divider: Decorative horizontal or vertical visual separator for non-edge-to-edge separation. Supports surface-aware divider tokens, inset, and custom line length.
legacySummaries.component:ds-empty-state: Centered placeholder for empty content, no results, or no access states.
legacySummaries.component:ds-field: Simple label wrapper that links to child input via htmlFor.
legacySummaries.component:ds-input: Text input supporting text, email, tel, url, search, and password types. Search type includes auto clear button.
legacySummaries.component:ds-loader: Anti-clockwise SVG spinner matching ds-icon size/color tokens.
legacySummaries.component:ds-modal: Dialog overlay with portal rendering, escape-to-close, backdrop click, focus management, and entry/exit animations.
legacySummaries.component:ds-pagination: Standalone page navigation with ellipsis for large ranges, sibling count control, and keyboard-accessible buttons.
legacySummaries.component:ds-radio-group: Radio selection group with vertical/horizontal layout, per-option inactive state, and keyboard navigation.
legacySummaries.component:ds-select: Dropdown select with unfilled-button chrome in control-density sizes and width hug/fill. Uses ds-menu for the option list.
legacySummaries.component:ds-skeleton: Loading placeholder with text, circular, and rectangular variants. Supports multi-line text and shimmer animation.
legacySummaries.component:ds-slider: Range input with visual fill track, label, and current value display.
legacySummaries.component:ds-tab-group: Horizontal or vertical tab list with roving keyboard focus and optional dividers between tab groups.
legacySummaries.component:ds-tab-group-nav: Navigation-style tab list for primary and secondary navigation surfaces.
legacySummaries.component:ds-table: Data table with CSS grid layout, sorting, pagination, loading skeleton, row selection, and custom cell rendering.
legacySummaries.component:ds-tag: Static metadata label with intent coloring and optional icon support. Uses control-density recipes for md/sm/xs.
legacySummaries.component:ds-text: Typography primitive supporting all design-system text variants, colors, truncation, and wrapping.
legacySummaries.component:ds-toggle: Switch control with on/off state and accessible switch semantics.
legacySummaries.component:ds-tooltip: Positioned tooltip with control-density sizes, delay, keyboard shortcut display, and viewport clamping.
